item.title: Corrupt Cop Steals Bitcoin From Silk Road
item.author: Seytonic
item.content:encoded:
Get 20% off DeleteMe US consumer plans when you go to https://joindeleteme.com/seytonic and use promo code SEYTONIC at checkout. DeleteMe International Plans: https://international.joindeleteme.com/
0:00 Intro 0:16 Corrupt Fed Stole Bitcoin from Silk Road 2:46 DeleteMe (ad) 3:54 XSS Admin Arrested 6:01 Ransomware Negotiator Under Investigation 7:02 Ransomware Gangs Hire Lawyers 8:05 Basketballer Arrested Over Ransomware
Sources: https://www.cps.gov.uk/cps/news/ex-nca-officer-jailed-theft-50-bitcoin-now-worth-ps44m-during-investigation-crime-dark-web
https://www.europol.europa.eu/media-press/newsroom/news/key-figure-behind-major-russian-speaking-cybercrime-forum-targeted-in-ukraine
https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/doj-investigates-ex-ransomware-negotiator-over-extortion-kickbacks/
https://www.cybereason.com/blog/threat-alert-qilin-seizes-control
https://www.bitdefender.com/en-gb/blog/hotforsecurity/russian-basketball-player-arrested-in-ransomware-case-despite-being-useless-with-computers =============================================== My Website: https://www.seytonic.com/ Follow me on TWTR: https://twitter.com/seytonic Follow me on INSTA: https://www.instagram.com/jhonti/ ===============================================
